meaning: n.牛轭U字形部分,U字形弯曲adj.呈U字形弯曲的
examples: Wetlands often develop in the meander scars of dried-up oxbow lakes.
An oxbow lake may survive as a water body for some time, especially if groundwater seeps into it.
He tied off both ends of the oxbow with fine black thread, snipped them, and pushed them back under the skin.
According to bettors, neither Skyring nor Oxbow had much of a shot in their races.
Oxbow is expected to travel to New York to contest the Belmont Stakes on June 8.
